assertions.assertion: Output enables all four event categories: RaiseSuccessEvents, RaiseFailureEvents, RaiseErrorEvents, and RaiseInformationEvents on the IdentityServer options
assertions.rationale: Code sets all four: RaiseSuccessEvents, RaiseFailureEvents, RaiseErrorEvents, RaiseInformationEvents to true.

assertions.assertion: Output implements IEventSink with a PersistAsync method that receives Event objects
assertions.rationale: SeqEventSink implements IEventSink with PersistAsync(Event evt) method.

assertions.assertion: Output writes events to Seq using structured logging (e.g., Serilog WriteTo.Seq) with event name, id, and details
assertions.rationale: SeqEventSink uses Serilog WriteTo.Seq and logs evt.Name, evt.Id, and @details.

assertions.assertion: Output registers the custom event sink in the DI container so IdentityServer uses it
